name: Public Joint-Stock Company Federal Grid Company of Unified Energy System
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company Federal Grid Company of Unified Energy System operates and manages electricity transmission grid infrastructure of Unified National Electric Grid in Russia. The company offers electricity transmission services to regional distribution companies, retail electricity suppliers, and large industrial enterprises; and maintains and develops the grid system and supervises grid facilities and infrastructure in 79 Russian regions. It also provides electricity transmission and technological connection services to participants of the wholesale electricity and capacity market. The company operates approximately 148,270 kilometers of transmission lines and 951 substations with approximately 352 GVA. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Moscow, Russia. Public Joint-Stock Company Federal Grid Company of Unified Energy System is a subsidiary of PJSC Rosseti.
